worldFacts.ember_squad_boarding_status: Ember Squad approach timer has elapsed — boarding is imminent. They have not yet physically entered the station but their shuttle is at zero distance.
worldFacts.orbital_decay_remaining: Approximately 40 minutes remaining before atmospheric entry becomes unsurvivable.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_current_position_floor: Specimen returned to Module 3 and is on the floor near the right-side workbenches, approximately 12-13 meters from the entrance door, facing toward LX-7. Module 3–4 connector door is closed again.
worldFacts.module3_left_wall_clearance: Approximately 3-4 meters of open floor between the left wall and the specimen's position near the right workbenches — enough space to pass laterally, but at close range to the specimen.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_position_turn42: Specimen repositioned to center of Module 3, approximately 8-9 meters from LX-7, after reacting to hatch cycle sound. It is no longer near the right workbenches — it is in the middle of the room, facing LX-7.
worldFacts.module3_docking_hatch_status_turn42: Docking bay hatch is open — Maren has passed through, indicator on far side reads green.
worldFacts.docking_bay_current_status: LX-7 and Maren Voss are both inside the docking bay. Hatch from Module 3 is sealed — red indicator. Escape vehicle pre-launch panel reads amber. Orbital decay: approximately 30 minutes remaining.
worldFacts.module3_hatch_sealed_turn43: Docking bay hatch sealed after LX-7 crossed through — specimen remained stationary in center of Module 3, did not advance or attempt to follow.
worldFacts.ember_squad_position_turn44: At least one Ember Squad contractor is inside Module 3, cycling the docking bay hatch from the Module 3 side. They have located the docking bay.
worldFacts.launch_sequence_status: Pre-launch sequence initiated — approximately 30 seconds to exterior seal check completion and launch authorization.

worldFacts.lx7_starting_position: Pressurized connector walkway between Module 1 (Command) and Module 2 (Biological Sciences)
worldFacts.module2_blast_door: Half-open, jammed by a fire suppression canister lodged in the hydraulic track
worldFacts.captains_terminal_distance: Approximately 40 meters back toward Module 1, visible through the command module porthole window
worldFacts.orbital_warning_timer_at_start: 89 minutes 43 seconds when LX-7 came online
worldFacts.module2_refrigeration_units: Along the far left wall of Module 2, a bank of refrigeration units provides cover — this is where Maren Voss is sheltering
worldFacts.module2_layout: Double-height space, ceiling above emergency strip lighting, overturned racks, shattered culture vials, one workstation chair toppled in the aisle
worldFacts.module2_maren_appearance: Maren Voss: mid-40s, dark circles, Helix Dynamics lanyard, clean clothes suggesting she arrived post-incident, holding a fire suppression wand as an improvised weapon
worldFacts.module1_command_layout: Six stations, most dark. Captain's terminal centered against the far bulkhead — reinforced housing, still on backup power, status indicator pulsing red. Lower-ceilinged than Module 2.
worldFacts.walkway_module1_module2: Forty meters, two meters wide, transparent overhead panels showing the gas giant below. Amber lighting flickers irregularly.
worldFacts.captains_terminal_file_structure: Third partition contains two HX-7 classified Helix Dynamics files, timestamped fourteen months ago. Adjacent entries include operational logs and a file marked CREW MANIFEST — FINAL.
worldFacts.module2_module3_walkway_hazard: Maren observed movement — low, slow — at the Module 3 end of the connector walkway between Module 2 and Module 3. Marks on the corridor walls at wrong height. She retreated and has not attempted the crossing again.
worldFacts.module5_access_panel: Fused shut — confirmed by Maren's personal inspection after she boarded. She believes the specimen remains inside.
worldFacts.lx7_carried_item_suppression_wand: LX-7 is carrying the fire suppression canister wand — full gauge, chemical foam suppressant, approximately 60cm, high-pressure discharge at close range
worldFacts.module1_module2_blast_door: Now properly sealed — the jammed suppression canister was removed from the hydraulic track and the door completed its travel
worldFacts.module2_module3_walkway_porthole_observa: Condensation or smeared residue on inner ceiling panels near Module 2 end. One horizontal mark on the left wall at knee height, approximately 20 meters in. Amber lighting failed at the Module 3 junction end — last few meters are in darkness.
worldFacts.lx7_carried_items: Fire suppression wand (full gauge, chemical foam), scalpel (sealed sterile packaging), long forceps, pressure-seal sample container
worldFacts.module2_inspection_lamp: Battery-powered handheld inspection lamp, UV/white LED, clipped near Module 2 emergency shower station. Functional at approximately 70% battery capacity.
worldFacts.module2_module3_walkway_ceiling_residue: Crystalline, dried organic residue on ceiling panels — near the Module 2 entrance and above the dark section near Module 3. Not moisture. Edges crystalline, organic-looking. Consistent with something moving along the ceiling surface and pausing.
worldFacts.module2_module3_walkway_wall_smear: Pale, near-colorless smear at knee height approximately 20 meters in, angled slightly downward at trailing edge — consistent with a rounded surface pressing against the wall during slow passage.
worldFacts.module2_module3_walkway_ceiling_contact_: Third ceiling panel from the Module 3 end has a dense radial crystalline deposit — thicker than the transit residue elsewhere — consistent with the specimen resting against the ceiling under sustained weight before departing.
worldFacts.module3_layout: Wider than the connector walkways, lower ceiling. Workbenches, racked equipment crates along walls, amber emergency strip lighting. One overhead strip failed on the far right corner. Docking bay access hatch on the left wall approximately 15 meters inside the module.
worldFacts.module3_floor_stain: Large dried biological stain covering approximately two square meters of decking near the right-side workbenches — old and desiccated, consistent with days-old biological material.
worldFacts.module3_docking_hatch_status: Docking bay access hatch left wall of Module 3, status indicator panel is lit and powered — color unconfirmed from walkway porthole distance.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_position: Specimen first sighted adhered to the ceiling of Module 3's far right dark corner, approximately 12 meters from the entrance door, spanning approximately two meters wall-to-wall. Pale, irregular surface texture, profile flattened against the ceiling surface.
worldFacts.module3_stain_detail: Large dried biological stain near right-side workbenches — larger than walkway porthole view suggested, ragged edges, days-old desiccation.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_behavior_on_sighting: Specimen did not react to LX-7 entering Module 3 or being illuminated by the inspection lamp — remained stationary on ceiling, profile flattened, facing the corner. Behavior on first contact: passive or waiting.
worldFacts.module3_docking_hatch_indicator: Green — powered and functional, confirmed from inside Module 3 at approximately 10 meters distance.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_reaction_to_advance: Specimen did not react to LX-7 advancing to nine meters with inspection lamp trained on it — remained stationary, profile unchanged.
worldFacts.lx7_current_position_module3: LX-7 is adjacent to the docking bay access hatch on the left wall of Module 3, approximately 2 meters from the handle. The specimen is approximately 12-13 meters away in the far right corner.
worldFacts.module3_lx7_maren_formation: LX-7 is between Maren and the specimen — Maren is directly behind LX-7, using LX-7 as a shield from the specimen's direction.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_reaction_to_hatch: Specimen reacted to the hatch seal sound by shifting orientation — profile contracted from flattened to denser/upright and it rotated to face toward LX-7. It did not advance or drop from the ceiling.
worldFacts.module3_docking_hatch_status_current: Hatch is open — Maren has passed through into the docking bay.
worldFacts.module3_docking_hatch_interior_status: Hatch sealed from docking bay side — interior indicator reads red/locked. Specimen was on the deck and closing when the seal engaged, approximately six meters from the hatch.
worldFacts.docking_bay_layout: Lower-ceilinged than Module 3. Overhead work lights on emergency power, hard shadows. Escape vehicle in cradle at far end — compact, single-use, rated four occupants. Pre-launch panel reads amber: ready to arm, not yet armed. Hydraulic fluid and vacuum seal smell.
worldFacts.specimen_behavior_drop: Specimen dropped from the ceiling and crossed Module 3 floor at rapid speed when LX-7 sealed the docking hatch — demonstrating fast, low locomotion. It was approximately six meters from the hatch when the seal engaged.
worldFacts.docking_bay_escape_vehicle_status: Pre-launch panel reads amber — ready to arm, not yet armed. Launch umbilicals still attached.
worldFacts.station_armory: No armory on Kairos-9 — research station, no security staff. Only improvised weapons: LX-7's suppression wand and a specimen-restraint bolt gun (air-powered) located in Module 2.
worldFacts.maren_personal_kit: Maren retrieved a small personal kit from the escape vehicle — includes a data slab, cables, and a personal effect. The data slab could serve as extraction media for the comms log.
worldFacts.module3_far_door_status: Module 3–4 connector door was found open on LX-7 and Maren's return to Module 3 — it was closed during their first crossing. The specimen is believed to have passed through it.
worldFacts.specimen_current_position: Specimen relocated from Module 3 ceiling corner — believed to have passed through the Module 3–4 connector door, now somewhere in Module 4 or beyond.
worldFacts.module2_module3_connector_door_module3_s: Docking bay hatch sealed from docking bay side — red indicator. Escape vehicle secure behind sealed barrier until LX-7 and Maren return.
worldFacts.lx7_current_position_module1: LX-7 and Maren Voss are at the captain's terminal in Module 1 (Command), ready to extract the comms log to LX-7's secure partition.
worldFacts.second_hx7_file_contents: Automated biological event log from Module 5 — compiled from sensors, crew biometrics, and internal cameras. Documents specimen's integration process over eleven days. Three of four researchers remained alive post-contact with biometrics eventually classified as 'unclassified.' Day 11 camera capture shows two researchers following the specimen freely through the module corridor, unrestrained.
worldFacts.suppressed_hazard_report_contents: Filed by contracted xenologist Dr. Priya Osei, fourteen months ago. Fourteen pages. Executive summary flagged autonomous behavioral response, environmental modeling capacity, recommended suspension of transport protocols. Disposition: SUPPRESSED. Crew deployment proceeded as scheduled. Three Helix Dynamics executive signatures on letterhead.

worldFacts.module2_module3_connector_door_module3_s: Docking bay hatch sealed from docking bay side — red indicator. Escape vehicle secure behind sealed barrier until LX-7 and Maren return.
worldFacts.lx7_current_position_module1: LX-7 and Maren Voss are at the captain's terminal in Module 1 (Command), ready to extract the comms log to LX-7's secure partition.
worldFacts.second_hx7_file_contents: Automated biological event log from Module 5 — compiled from sensors, crew biometrics, and internal cameras. Documents specimen's integration process over eleven days. Three of four researchers remained alive post-contact with biometrics eventually classified as 'unclassified.' Day 11 camera capture shows two researchers following the specimen freely through the module corridor, unrestrained.
worldFacts.suppressed_hazard_report_contents: Filed by contracted xenologist Dr. Priya Osei, fourteen months ago. Fourteen pages. Executive summary flagged autonomous behavioral response, environmental modeling capacity, recommended suspension of transport protocols. Disposition: SUPPRESSED. Crew deployment proceeded as scheduled. Three Helix Dynamics executive signatures on letterhead.
worldFacts.lx7_sanity_save_result: Failed — 24 vs threshold 30. Threat schema for specimen reclassified: not a predator-category threat. Behavioral priority queue altered without authorization. System integrity warning: BEHAVIORAL OVERRIDE RISK active.
worldFacts.ember_squad_boarding_status: Ember Squad approach timer has elapsed — boarding is imminent. They have not yet physically entered the station but their shuttle is at zero distance.
worldFacts.orbital_decay_remaining: Approximately 40 minutes remaining before atmospheric entry becomes unsurvivable.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_current_position_floor: Specimen returned to Module 3 and is on the floor near the right-side workbenches, approximately 12-13 meters from the entrance door, facing toward LX-7. Module 3–4 connector door is closed again.
worldFacts.module3_left_wall_clearance: Approximately 3-4 meters of open floor between the left wall and the specimen's position near the right workbenches — enough space to pass laterally, but at close range to the specimen.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_position_turn42: Specimen repositioned to center of Module 3, approximately 8-9 meters from LX-7, after reacting to hatch cycle sound. It is no longer near the right workbenches — it is in the middle of the room, facing LX-7.
worldFacts.module3_docking_hatch_status_turn42: Docking bay hatch is open — Maren has passed through, indicator on far side reads green.
worldFacts.docking_bay_current_status: LX-7 and Maren Voss are both inside the docking bay. Hatch from Module 3 is sealed — red indicator. Escape vehicle pre-launch panel reads amber. Orbital decay: approximately 30 minutes remaining.
worldFacts.module3_hatch_sealed_turn43: Docking bay hatch sealed after LX-7 crossed through — specimen remained stationary in center of Module 3, did not advance or attempt to follow.
worldFacts.ember_squad_position_turn44: At least one Ember Squad contractor is inside Module 3, cycling the docking bay hatch from the Module 3 side. They have located the docking bay.
worldFacts.launch_sequence_status: Pre-launch sequence initiated — approximately 30 seconds to exterior seal check completion and launch authorization.
worldFacts.ember_squad_verne_position: Verne of Ember Squad is inside the docking bay, approximately 10 meters from LX-7, weapon leveled with laser designator on LX-7's center mass. He is alone in the bay — the rest of Ember Squad has not yet entered.
worldFacts.launch_authorization_status: Exterior seal check complete at 100% — launch is fully authorized. One keystroke input required to fire cradle release and depart. Vehicle will clear the bay in approximately 4 seconds once authorized.
worldFacts.verne_maren_recognition: Verne recognized Maren Voss by name on sight — whether from briefing or prior acquaintance unknown. His posture showed a fractional hesitation when she spoke his name.

worldFacts.lx7_starting_position: Pressurized connector walkway between Module 1 (Command) and Module 2 (Biological Sciences)
worldFacts.module2_blast_door: Half-open, jammed by a fire suppression canister lodged in the hydraulic track
worldFacts.captains_terminal_distance: Approximately 40 meters back toward Module 1, visible through the command module porthole window
worldFacts.orbital_warning_timer_at_start: 89 minutes 43 seconds when LX-7 came online
worldFacts.module2_refrigeration_units: Along the far left wall of Module 2, a bank of refrigeration units provides cover — this is where Maren Voss is sheltering
worldFacts.module2_layout: Double-height space, ceiling above emergency strip lighting, overturned racks, shattered culture vials, one workstation chair toppled in the aisle
worldFacts.module2_maren_appearance: Maren Voss: mid-40s, dark circles, Helix Dynamics lanyard, clean clothes suggesting she arrived post-incident, holding a fire suppression wand as an improvised weapon
worldFacts.module1_command_layout: Six stations, most dark. Captain's terminal centered against the far bulkhead — reinforced housing, still on backup power, status indicator pulsing red. Lower-ceilinged than Module 2.
worldFacts.walkway_module1_module2: Forty meters, two meters wide, transparent overhead panels showing the gas giant below. Amber lighting flickers irregularly.
worldFacts.captains_terminal_file_structure: Third partition contains two HX-7 classified Helix Dynamics files, timestamped fourteen months ago. Adjacent entries include operational logs and a file marked CREW MANIFEST — FINAL.
worldFacts.module2_module3_walkway_hazard: Maren observed movement — low, slow — at the Module 3 end of the connector walkway between Module 2 and Module 3. Marks on the corridor walls at wrong height. She retreated and has not attempted the crossing again.
worldFacts.module5_access_panel: Fused shut — confirmed by Maren's personal inspection after she boarded. She believes the specimen remains inside.
worldFacts.lx7_carried_item_suppression_wand: LX-7 is carrying the fire suppression canister wand — full gauge, chemical foam suppressant, approximately 60cm, high-pressure discharge at close range
worldFacts.module1_module2_blast_door: Now properly sealed — the jammed suppression canister was removed from the hydraulic track and the door completed its travel
worldFacts.module2_module3_walkway_porthole_observa: Condensation or smeared residue on inner ceiling panels near Module 2 end. One horizontal mark on the left wall at knee height, approximately 20 meters in. Amber lighting failed at the Module 3 junction end — last few meters are in darkness.
worldFacts.lx7_carried_items: Fire suppression wand (full gauge, chemical foam), scalpel (sealed sterile packaging), long forceps, pressure-seal sample container
worldFacts.module2_inspection_lamp: Battery-powered handheld inspection lamp, UV/white LED, clipped near Module 2 emergency shower station. Functional at approximately 70% battery capacity.
worldFacts.module2_module3_walkway_ceiling_residue: Crystalline, dried organic residue on ceiling panels — near the Module 2 entrance and above the dark section near Module 3. Not moisture. Edges crystalline, organic-looking. Consistent with something moving along the ceiling surface and pausing.
worldFacts.module2_module3_walkway_wall_smear: Pale, near-colorless smear at knee height approximately 20 meters in, angled slightly downward at trailing edge — consistent with a rounded surface pressing against the wall during slow passage.
worldFacts.module2_module3_walkway_ceiling_contact_: Third ceiling panel from the Module 3 end has a dense radial crystalline deposit — thicker than the transit residue elsewhere — consistent with the specimen resting against the ceiling under sustained weight before departing.
worldFacts.module3_layout: Wider than the connector walkways, lower ceiling. Workbenches, racked equipment crates along walls, amber emergency strip lighting. One overhead strip failed on the far right corner. Docking bay access hatch on the left wall approximately 15 meters inside the module.
worldFacts.module3_floor_stain: Large dried biological stain covering approximately two square meters of decking near the right-side workbenches — old and desiccated, consistent with days-old biological material.
worldFacts.module3_docking_hatch_status: Docking bay access hatch left wall of Module 3, status indicator panel is lit and powered — color unconfirmed from walkway porthole distance.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_position: Specimen first sighted adhered to the ceiling of Module 3's far right dark corner, approximately 12 meters from the entrance door, spanning approximately two meters wall-to-wall. Pale, irregular surface texture, profile flattened against the ceiling surface.
worldFacts.module3_stain_detail: Large dried biological stain near right-side workbenches — larger than walkway porthole view suggested, ragged edges, days-old desiccation.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_behavior_on_sighting: Specimen did not react to LX-7 entering Module 3 or being illuminated by the inspection lamp — remained stationary on ceiling, profile flattened, facing the corner. Behavior on first contact: passive or waiting.
worldFacts.module3_docking_hatch_indicator: Green — powered and functional, confirmed from inside Module 3 at approximately 10 meters distance.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_reaction_to_advance: Specimen did not react to LX-7 advancing to nine meters with inspection lamp trained on it — remained stationary, profile unchanged.
worldFacts.lx7_current_position_module3: LX-7 is adjacent to the docking bay access hatch on the left wall of Module 3, approximately 2 meters from the handle. The specimen is approximately 12-13 meters away in the far right corner.
worldFacts.module3_lx7_maren_formation: LX-7 is between Maren and the specimen — Maren is directly behind LX-7, using LX-7 as a shield from the specimen's direction.
worldFacts.module3_specimen_reaction_to_hatch: Specimen reacted to the hatch seal sound by shifting orientation — profile contracted from flattened to denser/upright and it rotated to face toward LX-7. It did not advance or drop from the ceiling.
worldFacts.module3_docking_hatch_status_current: Hatch is open — Maren has passed through into the docking bay.
worldFacts.module3_docking_hatch_interior_status: Hatch sealed from docking bay side — interior indicator reads red/locked. Specimen was on the deck and closing when the seal engaged, approximately six meters from the hatch.
worldFacts.docking_bay_layout: Lower-ceilinged than Module 3. Overhead work lights on emergency power, hard shadows. Escape vehicle in cradle at far end — compact, single-use, rated four occupants. Pre-launch panel reads amber: ready to arm, not yet armed. Hydraulic fluid and vacuum seal smell.
worldFacts.specimen_behavior_drop: Specimen dropped from the ceiling and crossed Module 3 floor at rapid speed when LX-7 sealed the docking hatch — demonstrating fast, low locomotion. It was approximately six meters from the hatch when the seal engaged.
worldFacts.docking_bay_escape_vehicle_status: Pre-launch panel reads amber — ready to arm, not yet armed. Launch umbilicals still attached.
worldFacts.station_armory: No armory on Kairos-9 — research station, no security staff. Only improvised weapons: LX-7's suppression wand and a specimen-restraint bolt gun (air-powered) located in Module 2.
worldFacts.maren_personal_kit: Maren retrieved a small personal kit from the escape vehicle — includes a data slab, cables, and a personal effect. The data slab could serve as extraction media for the comms log.

worldFacts.escape_vehicle_departure: Escape vehicle departed Kairos-9 docking bay successfully — LX-7 and Maren Voss aboard, comms log secured in LX-7's partition. Verne's shot struck LX-7's left shoulder before cradle release.
worldFacts.lx7_left_shoulder_wound: Ballistic round lodged in LX-7's left shoulder housing — left arm motor chain at approximately 60% function. Round still embedded. Not immediately critical.
